message:
Fix parse_metadata to preserve empty object semantics

The previous implementation returned Value::Null for "{}", but the
original code returned Value::Object({}) from parsing. This would
change JSON output from "metadata": {} to "metadata": null.

Now correctly returns:
- "{}" → empty object (preserves original behavior)
- "null" → Value::Null

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
